summary: Live PR inventory shard classified conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned because merge, fix PR, instant close, and low-signal closeout are disabled; one linked security-sensitive issue is routed to central security handling. The open PRs remain open for proof, maintainer review, or targeted technical judgment rather than closure.
